module.name: ocibnkctl
module.description: ocibnkctl — deploy F5 BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes 2.3.1 on a native k3s cluster running as containers on the host docker/podman runtime (demo mode, no DPU/SR-IOV). Runs inside the digest-pinned ocibnkctl-tools-runner image via the docker-socket proxy.

required.name: customer
required.description: Customer name recorded in the PoC repo created by ocibnkctl init.
